---
title: "Chen"
subtitle: "Mathematics · Topology · Quantum Invariants"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/cyw6130
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your_email@edu.com
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.column-page}

## About Me

I am a graduate student in Mathematics at **Bilibili University**, passionate about exploring the elegant structures that connect algebra, geometry, and topology.

My research lies at the intersection of **Low-Dimensional Topology** and **Algebraic Topology**, where I investigate how algebraic structures give rise to powerful invariants of knots and manifolds.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon=false}

### Interests

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
- **Khovanov Homology**  
  khovanov homology 是琼斯多项式的范畴化, 从 khovanov homology的基本定义出发, 发展出了丰富的内容.
  - 首先, 它是纽结不变量, 可以区分纽结.
  - 通过形变的 khovanov homology (Lee homology), 我们可以定义s-invariant, 它可以用来限制纽结的亏格, 从而可以证明 $\mathbb{R}^4$上[存在怪异的光滑结构](notes/Khovanov_homology.qmd).
  - 从 cube 出发, 我们可以定义一个广义空间(谱:spectrum), 它是纽结不变量(可以用来区分 khovanov homology 无法区分的纽结), 这套理论将纽结和稳定同伦论联系起来.
  - 近些年, skein lasagna module 定义了四维流形的光滑不变量, Qiuyu Ren 等人首次利用这个不变量区分了光滑四维流形的怪异对(两个同胚却不微分同胚的流形).
  
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
- **H-Cobordism**  
  这是解决广义庞加莱猜想的关键工具, 也是研究高维流形上面光滑结构的重要起点. h-cobordism 理论给出了研究流形的一般办法, 我们可以在 3 维, 4 维上看到这种方法的实践. 
  
- **Non-Semisimple TQFTs**  
  Modified traces in non-unimodular categories
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
- **4-manifold and Gauge Theory**
:::

::::
:::

---

## Recent Updates

::: {.timeline}

| Date | Event |
|:-----|:------|
| **Mon 2026** | 准备解析数论期末考试, 我的 [pre](notes/bernoulli.qmd) |
| **Dec 2025** | 学习 h-cobordism, surgery theory |
| **Nov 2025** | 学习 khovanov homology 及相关的 topics |
| **Oct 2025** | 计算 torus bundle 的非半单 RT 不变量 |
| **Sept 2025** | 学习 mapping class group 相关 |

:::

---

## Selected Notes

探索拓扑学的美丽世界，从量子不变量到流形结构：

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### [h-cobordism 理论](notes/h_cobordism_4.qmd)

State-sum construction of 3-manifold invariants using 6j-symbols from spherical fusion categories.

`Differential Topology` `Algebraic Topology`
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### [Khovanov 同调](notes/Khovanov_homology.qmd)

A categorification of the Jones polynomial that provides strictly stronger invariants for links.

`Categorification` `Knot Theory` `4-manifold`
:::
:::
:::

:::

:::
